title: Smart Airlines Addons
description: A premium travel personalization platform that allows passengers to customize their flight journey with curated addons, seamless booking integration, secure payments, and 24/7 support.

title: Industrial Sensor Monitoring Communication (ISMC)
description: An academic digital communication and signal processing project modeling BPSK-based transmission. Shows how industrial sensor data is transmitted, filtered, and analyzed through a noisy AWGN channel.
features: Real-time signal filtering and analysis interface

title: Industrial Staff Sync Network Environment (ISSNE)
description: An AI-powered workforce management platform that revolutionizes attendance tracking, real-time work hours calculation, and predictive salary analytics.
